text: Standing here, I am struck by the intentionality in design—glass walls, bright lights, and open spaces evoke a sense of innovation and potential. Upon entering this area dedicated to "R+D," I feel as though I am at the crossroads of knowledge and creativity. The messages on the wall encourage collaboration and progress. I feel slightly disoriented by the tilted perspective, but also invigorated by the promise of discovery and the hum of possibility all around me.
